mutants.description: Flipped major/minor/patch comparison: returns -1 when v1Part > v2Part
Swapped prerelease return: release vs prerelease yields -1 instead of 1
Wrong default for missing part: uses 1 instead of 0 for v2Part
Changed > to >= so equal parts incorrectly return 1

killed_mutants.description: Flipped major/minor/patch comparison: returns -1 when v1Part > v2Part
Swapped prerelease return: release vs prerelease yields -1 instead of 1
Wrong default for missing part: uses 1 instead of 0 for v2Part
Changed > to >= so equal parts incorrectly return 1

mutants.description: Two different prerelease versions (e.g. 1.0.0-alpha vs 1.0.0-beta) always return 0 since prerelease identifiers are never compared
Loop uses Math.min so extra trailing parts (e.g. 1.0.1 vs 1.0) beyond the shorter version are never compared
parseInt called without radix 10 so leading-zero octal-like parts (e.g. 1.08) parse incorrectly in some environments
Prerelease detected only on first segment containing '-' so a dash in the patch (e.g. 1.0.0-rc) is detected but a dash like 1.0-x.0 is missed
Non-numeric leading part (e.g. 'v1' or '') yields NaN instead of 0 when match captures but parseInt yields NaN; uses match[2] check causing wrong fallback
